questions.question: Describe the key characteristics of a project in the context of data analytics using Spark. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Define project scope, goals, and deliverables

questions.question: What is the primary objective of a project in data analytics using Spark, and how does it relate to the big data analytics process? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Elaborate on the project's purpose, data analysis, and outcomes

questions.question: An analyst is working on a project using Spark to analyze customer data. What are three potential benefits of using Spark for this project? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss scalability, flexibility, and speed of processing
